name: Best Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Betty Crocker's Old-Fashioned Cookbook, c199.
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare baking pans by greasing and flouring a rectangular pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches), or two round pans (8 x 1-1/2 inches).
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except Fudge Frosting on low speed for 30 seconds.
4. Scrape the bowl constantly and then beat on high speed for 3 minutes.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes (rectangular pan) or 30 to 35 minutes (round pans) until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow rounds to cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
8. Prepare Fudge Frosting by mixing all ingredients except vanilla extract in a 1-1/2 quart saucepan.
9. Heat mixture over medium heat, stirring occasionally until it reaches a rolling boil.
10. Boil for 1 minute without stirring, then remove from heat and place in a bowl of ice water.
11. Beat the frosting until smooth and at a spreading consistency, then stir in vanilla extract.
12. Frost the cooled cake layers with 1/3 cup frosting, then frost the sides and top with the remaining frosting.
13. Serve 12 to 16 portions.
